name: Red Beans and Rice#4
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté garlic and onion with seasonings.
2. Add rice, beans, and ham; cook over medium heat.
3. Stir in approximately 1/4 cup water or liquid from beans.
4. Cook until heated through.
Serves: 4 (1 cup servings)
Calories: 306
Protein: 19 g
Fat: 4 g
Carbohydrates: 48 g
Fiber: 10.4 g
Cholesterol: 21 mg
Sodium: 555 mg (high in sodium)
Potassium: 731 mg
Exchange: 3 starch/bread 1 medium-fat meat
